item.epicfight_arachne.arachne_egg.tip_2: [Using it in Arachne's Webbed Nest returns you to the respawn point; using it outside sprays venom around]
item.epicfight_arachne.arachne_egg.tip_3: [The venom inflicts the Severe Poison effect on hit creatures]
item.epicfight_arachne.arachne_egg.tip_4: [When the venom bursts, it leaves a patch of poisonous mist]
item.epicfight_arachne.arachne_harp.tip_: [A harp lost in the mortal world]
[Using it will transport you to Arachne's Webbed Nest; using it within Arachne's Webbed Nest will summon Arachne]
